name: Get transaction outcomes v1 returns a valid outcome code

steps.name: Given that checkout host is configured through environment variable
And the checkout NPG environment variables are configured
Given the full NPG authorization flow is executed
When the user retrieves the transaction outcomes v1
Then the response has status code 200
And the outcomes response contains a valid outcome code

fullName: Checkout eCommerce — NPG payment gateway: Get transaction outcomes v1 returns a valid outcome code
